nodes.description: When that light hits the sky, it's not just a call. It's a warning.   Sideshow presents The Batman™ Fine Art Print, a stirring DC Comics art print by artist Chris Skinner.  Vengeance takes to the Gotham City streets in The Batman Fine Art Print, featuring the infamous vigilante himself as he stands in a sprawling alley. Painted white words — messages from The Riddler — adorn dilapidated buildings, metal pipes, and the dusty pavement on which the Batmobile is parked. Shadows close in around The Batman, yet he stares resolutely at the one bright spot in the sky: the Bat-Signal, brilliant as it shines above black skyscrapers and against dark clouds.  This DC Comics collectible brings the tense and hopeful atmosphere of Matt Reeves' The Batman (2022) into fine art form. Available as an unframed fine art giclée print or in a custom framed presentation, each The Batman Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as part of the limited edition of 400 pieces.  Answer the call and bring home The Batman Fine Art Print by Chris Skinner today!
nodes.name: The Batman™

nodes.description: I made a vow to have peace no matter how many people I have to kill to get it.   Sideshow presents the Peacemaker Fine Art Print, a vivacious and celebratory DC Comics art print by artist Travis Knight.  Eat peace, art collectors! The Peacemaker Fine Art Print features Christopher Smith and his best pal Eagly the eagle in all their glory. Both of their skeletons are revealed in the bold lines of an X-ray vision motif. Wearing his signature silver helmet, Peacemaker shows off his impressive muscles while Eagly salutes the American flag that overlays our patriotic pair. But Eagly's not the only fair-feathered friend pictured. Peacemaker's graceful Dove of Peace adorns his chest and head, reminding everyone that this violent vigilante is all for armistice — through armed warfare!  Inspired by James Gunn's Peacemaker television series, this stylish DC Comics collectible, presented as an unframed fine art giclée print or in a custom framed format, is exactly what Peacemaker fans need to honor their favorite super hero. Each Peacemaker Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature as well as an embossed Seal of Authenticity as part of the limited edition of 300 pieces.  Pledge your allegiance to Christopher Smith and his esteemed avian when you bring home the Peacemaker Fine Art Print by Travis Knight today!
nodes.name: Peacemaker

nodes.description: I would like to RAGE!   Sideshow presents our Grog – Vox Machina Statue, barreling his way into the Critical Role collection. This statue stands 13.5 tall and 14' wide and is fully sculpted to bring the hulking half-giant from the Herd of Storms to life in three dimensions.  Bidet! Meet Grog Strongjaw, Grand Poobah de Doink of All This and That. With a hardened exterior and a soft heart, this loyal member of Vox Machina is here to tear his way through Tal'Dorei and take more than a few arrows for the team. Full of fury, Grog bellows a war cry as he readies his bloodied axe for more battle. He is depicted here as a high-level brawler, wearing his signature skull spaulder, a dwarven belt for strength, and one of the Vestiges of Divergence known as the Titanstone Knuckles.  Sideshow's Grog – Vox Machina Statue features a hexagonal faux-stone figure base engraved with the Vox Machina monogram, complementing his other teammates in the collection. Designed with great detail and incredible musculature, this Critical Role figure is complete with his robust beard, a bear tattoo on his back, and several open wounds that are mere scratches to this hardy hero. Pair Grog with his teammates Vex'ahlia and Vax'ildan to assemble a legendary adventuring team on your shelf — just mind the prank war that's bound to ensue.  Add some dense defense to your display of Critical Role collectibles with Sideshow's Grog – Vox Machina Statue today!
nodes.name: Grog - Vox Machina

nodes.description: Sideshow and Infinite Statue are thrilled to present the Burt Reynolds on Pontiac Firebird Trans Am 1980 1:18 Scale Statue!  Handsome, powerful, and athletic, with a friendly smile and an assortment of ironic expressions, Burt Reynolds is remembered as one of the most popular and best-loved American actors. With a successful film and TV career spanning over 60 years, Reynolds played a wide variety of roles, switching with great skill and talent from westerns to adventure, from comedy to action. A tough and witty sex symbol, he triumphed on the big screen in the 1970s and '80s with films that marked an era in Hollywood cinema and beyond. The Longest Yard, Deliverance, The Cannonball Run, and the 1977 blockbuster Smokey and the Bandit are just some of his many successful performances.  Among American muscle cars, the Pontiac Trans-Am undoubtedly remains the most iconic, coveted, and best-loved of them all. The undisputed queen of beauty and power, it has been the star of very many films and TV series. With its unmistakable, intricately-decorated livery, its distinctive removable roof panels, and unrivaled toughness, the Pontiac remains a timeless car, one of those automobiles that spans generations and retains its untarnished beauty, hallmarked by its universal appeal. We have worked hard to faithfully reproduce every detail, without neglecting any facet of its now mythical perfection. This is a step forward in model cars, offered to all collectors as part of the Cars Legacy Collection with pride and enthusiasm.  For the car lovers and Burt Reynolds admirers out there, this amazing statue will add some serious firepower to your collection!
nodes.name: Burt Reynolds on Pontiac Firebird Trans Am 1980

nodes.description: Cloud, wearing one of the dresses from the unforgettable Wall Market section of FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE, joins the STATIC ARTS line!  While retaining Cloud's stoic demeanor, the figure nails Cloud's makeup, hair ornament, and pigtails. Every fine detail has particular attention paid to it, from the texture of the ruffles on the sleeves and collar, to the accessories, ribbons, and skirt folds. The realistic details, such as Cloud's skin texture among others, show a level of quality that only STATIC ARTS can achieve.  Base Included
nodes.name: Cloud Strife (Dress Ver.)

nodes.description: The original designs of the beloved classic, FINAL FANTASY VII, are now joining the BRING ARTS Action Figure series, starting with the game's iconic protagonist, Cloud Strife! Cloud's signature hairstyle, shoulder armor, and SOLDIER uniform are all faithfully recreated in 3D to instill a sense of nostalgia of his look in the original title.  From Cloud's facial expression to the wrinkles and textures of his clothes, every inch of this figure has been meticulously detailed. The figure comes with a variety of interchangeable hands and Cloud's iconic weapon, the Buster Sword, which can be held in his hands or worn on his back. Figure includes display stand, and 24 points of articulation.
nodes.name: Cloud Strife

nodes.description: Make your Star Wars Celebration last all year with this portable cooler lunch bag. The Star Wars Celebration On The Go Lunch Cooler has impressive space, velcro side straps ensure the strength to carry heavy items without worry.  This lunch cooler also features a zippered compartment for dry items and an easy-clean cooler section. Celebrate your Star Wars fandom every day with this rugged cooler tote!  *Surface wash with a damp cloth only. Spot clean. Do not immerse in water. Dry immediately.
nodes.name: Star Wars Celebration on the Go Lunch Cooler

nodes.description: Sideshow and Kotobukiya present the Alphen Statue.  Alphen from Tales of Arise is coming to life as a 1:8 scale figure.  His distinct expression shows his strength as he fixes his sharp gaze ahead. Brandishing his blazing sword, Alphen comes to life in a heroic pose right as the battle is about to begin.  His large, complex armor has been faithfully recreated down to the smallest detail. The realistic paintwork, including the metallic-looking texture and tiny scratches, combine to create a truly authentic finish.  Alphen's blazing sword has been made with clear parts. His right arm, burning along with his sword, has also been recreated with excellent painting techniques.  In addition to the dynamic sculpting of his large cape blowing in the wind, fine details such as small rips and a painted gradation have been beautifully added to this figure.  The combination of the powerful sculpt and detailed finish is sure to be the highlight of this masterpiece.  Add him to your collection today!  Display him together with the upcoming Rinwell and Dohalim to recreate the world of Tales of Arise.
nodes.name: Alphen

nodes.description: Grass stains and spilled drinks don't stand a chance against the Star Wars The Child Vista Outdoor Blanket! A durable portable picnic blanket with a cozy The Child-themed topside and solid-colored underside that packs compactly into a carry tote with an adjustable carry strap and extra-large pocket.  Don't worry about getting this blanket tote dirty, it's machine washer & dryer safe! Precious cargo, indeed. Make sure to order yours today!  *Machine wash warm and machine dry, medium heat. Do not dry clean. Do not iron.
nodes.name: The Child Vista Outdoor Picnic Blanket & Tote

nodes.description: GREAT HERA! – Diana of Themyscira  Prime 1 Studio is proud to bring you another version of the very popular Wonder Woman from DC's award-winning fighting game: the 1:4 Scale PMDCIJ-06GL Premium Masterline Wonder Woman Great Hera from Injustice 2!   Now, not only is Wonder Woman's signature exclamation part of the statue's name, but it is also the name of this stunning Injustice 2 loadout! At an impressive 20.7 inches, Wonder Woman Great Hera dons a beautiful brown and gold battle suit as she stands victoriously astride the fallen ruins of her battle zone.  Prime 1 Studio's skilled artisans have delivered a must-have alternate for our previous Injustice 2 Wonder Woman statue. In this iteration, Wonder Woman dons an attractive and period-authentic battle garb. Her golden accents glow against the dark brown of her bodysuit, which looks as though hewn from tough but supple leather. Her perfect, alabaster skin contrasts the battle-ready armor she inhabits.  Wonder Woman Great Hera comes with three different swappable portraits with alternate tiaras and facial expressions, alternate swords and shields, and an option to switch to Wonder Woman wielding her Lasso of Truth.  Wonder Woman Great Hera stands powerfully on an Injustice 2-inspired base...a battlefield in which she was the obvious victor! Powered with LED Illumination, the base's blue flames look like they are burning hot as the fires of Hades!  Don't leave this version out of your growing Injustice 2 statue collection!!! Pre-Order PMDCIJ-06GL Wonder Woman Great Hera today!
nodes.name: Wonder Woman (Great Hera Version)

nodes.description: Cloud, wearing one of the dresses from the unforgettable Wall Market section of FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE, joins the PLAY ARTS KAI figure line!  While retaining Cloud's stoic demeanor, the figure nails Cloud's makeup, hair ornament, and pigtails. Every fine detail has particular attention paid to it; from the texture of the ruffles on the sleeves and collar, to the accessories, ribbons, and skirt folds. Accessories include a swappable head part with a different expression, as well as several swappable hand parts. Swapping the hand parts allows you to clasp Cloud's hands together in front of his waist, recreating the pose from the game.  Figure includes display stand
nodes.name: Cloud Strife (Dress Ver.)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Kotobukiya present the Maki Zen'in Statue.  From the TV anime, Jujutsu Kaisen, Maki Zen'in will be released by Kotobukiya as a scale figure!  She comes to life in a powerful stance gripping the special grade cursed tool, 'Playful Cloud'. Extra attention was paid to the flow of her hair and wrinkles in her outfit, making for an incredible sculpt that overflows with energy. This figure perfectly captures Maki's nimble and dynamic fighting style.  The design of the base uses the character's signature colors to recreate the atmosphere of the series.  Display her with Toge Inumaki and Panda to recreate the world of Jujutsu Kaisen!
nodes.name: Maki Zen'in

nodes.description: The R2-D2 Topanga Cooler Tote is the perfect all-around bag. It's made of durable polyester with complementing stitching accents to enhance its simple yet sophisticated lines. The interior is made of heat-sealed PVC for no leaks and it is large enough to carry 24 soda cans!  It's perfect for carrying food and drinks to the beach or pool and features a separate exterior pocket that's the perfect size for your wallet or keys. It can also be used to carry your wet swimsuits and towels on the trip home.  Make sure to order yours today and May the force be with you!  *Surface wash with a damp cloth.
nodes.name: R2-D2 Topanga Cooler Tote Bag

nodes.description: The shroud of the dark side has fallen. Begun the Clone War has.   Sideshow presents the Yoda™ Legendary Scale™ Figure, a 1:2 scale Star Wars™ collectible bringing the action of galactic conflict to your collection.  The Yoda Legendary Scale Figure measures 20 tall and 13.6 wide as he crouches atop the charred torso of a B1 battle droid, one of countless foot soldiers in the Separatist Army. Inspired by his iconic appearance in the prequel trilogy, Yoda displays agility and battle prowess, wielding his green lightsaber as he works alongside the Jedi Order to combat the dark forces rising throughout the galaxy. Yoda's lightsaber has a light-up feature for an added display option.  The polystone Yoda Legendary Scale Figure features a mixed media costume application, with detailed inner and outer fabric robes that include wiring in the hem for dynamic draping and movement. Yoda's portrait also features a synthetic hair element giving the diminutive Jedi Master his signature wizened appearance. Sculpted in great detail to bring his distinct look to life, Yoda is crafted with wrinkles, yellowed claws, and soft blushes of red in his ears and cheeks that give this incredible Star Wars statue added depth and realism.  Fight against the darkness, you must. Bring home the Yoda Legendary Scale Figure for your Star Wars collection today!
nodes.name: Yoda

nodes.description: There's something inside of me that wants to hunt and consume blood. - Morbius  Dr. Michael Morbius is a biochemist who suffers from a rare genetic disorder and is almost hopeless in treating itt. In true mad scientist fashion, he tries to cure himself using vampire bat blood and is healed… but inadvertently turns himself into a new being – a vampire with superhuman powers including enhanced agility, strength, and stamina.   Sideshow and Hot Toys are thrilled to present the highly-anticipated sixth scale collectible figure featuring Morbius inspired by the movie that shares the same title.  The movie-accurate Mobius collectible figure is skillfully crafted based on Jared Leto's image as Morbius from the movie, features a newly developed head sculpt with red eyes and sharp teeth capturing varying degrees of his grisly nature, meticulously tailored outfit including a long coat with fine details, highly-detailed swarm of bats to recreate the scene with Morbius summons the bats, several pieces of speeding effect parts, and a figure stand.   The figure of the Living Vampire is striking into your unconventional Marvel display!
nodes.name: Morbius

nodes.description: Fear and respect are not equals.   Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Jade Mortal Kombat 1:3 Scale Klassic Statue, a fierce new video game collectible inspired by the iconic fighting game heroine.  The Jade 1:3 Scale Klassic Statue measures 30 tall and 12 wide on a pedestal base inspired by the Dead Pool stage seen throughout the Mortal Kombat series. Skeletal remains float in the bubbling acid beneath Jade's boots while she stands with her weapons at the ready. She holds the Imperial Jubilee bo staff in her right hand, and her left clutches the razor-rang known as Shao Kahn's Bane.  The Jade Statue is inspired by her Klassic appearance in the Mortal Kombat games, fully sculpted with detailed costume textures and an athletic physique. This stealth assassin and imperial bodyguard wears a green and black bodysuit with matching gloves and thigh-high boots. Accents like mesh, lacing, and rivets add to the vibrant design of her signature style. Jade's masked portrait features black hair drawn into a bun, a pair of black earrings, and an intense expression as she seeks to protect Kitana and end the cruel reign of Shao Kahn. The statue also includes an additional unmasked portrait featuring an alternate hairstyle, with long black hair flowing down and around her back. With her focused expression revealed in full, collectors have an added display option in their collection.  Forget the Fatality — put the finishing touch on your video game collection with the Jade Mortal Kombat 1:3 Scale Klassic Statue from Premium Collectibles Studio today!
nodes.name: Jade

nodes.description: I became Moon Knight to battle evil wherever I could find it. And I never had to look farther than the darkness inside my own heart.   Sideshow Art Prints and Bill Sienkiewicz Art present the Moon Knight: Vigilante Fine Art Lithograph, a new Marvel Comics art print for fans of the Fist of Khonshu.  As the Avatar of Khonshu, Egyptian god of the moon, Marc Spector is tasked with shining a light in the darkness. He dons the persona of Moon Knight in order to punish those living in the shadows of evil. This moody illustration by Bill Sienkiewicz shows the astral glow of Marc's crescent moon blades as he embraces the chaos that comes from the changing lunar cycle and his own life in service of Khonshu.  Originally created as a cover for the movie magazine Empire, this portrait of a celestial super hero is now available for fans in a fine art collectible format. Each Moon Knight: Vigilante Fine Art Lithograph is hand-signed by Sienkiewicz and includes a Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of only 100 pieces. Available as an unframed certified archival lithograph print or in a custom framed presentation, this Moon Knight wall art is a must-have for Marvel collectors!   Begin a new phase of your collection and bring home the Moon Knight: Vigilante Fine Art Lithograph by Bill Sienkiewicz today.
nodes.name: Moon Knight: Vigilante

nodes.description: Sideshow and Threezero present the Ultraman Suit Zoffy (Anime Version) Sixth Scale Figure.  From the Ultraman Season 2 anime, ULTRAMAN SUIT ZOFFY is now available as a 1/6th scale articulated figure! This ULTRAMAN SUIT was worn by Shin Hayata, the father of Shinjiro, who had once fused with Ultraman to protect the Earth in his youth.  FigZero 1/6 ULTRAMAN SUIT ZOFFY (Anime Version) stands approximately 30.5cm (~12 ) tall, and is a fully-articulated figure with over 40 points of articulation. The collectible has a detailed paint application and decals, and is constructed partially of die-cast zinc alloy and other metal parts. LED light-up features are installed at the eyes and the Color Timer on the chest.  Effect parts included with this item are one pair of Specium Blade pieces to attach to the forearms, and one pair of Ultra Slash pieces to attach to the wrists. Other accessories include four pairs of interchangeable hands: One pair of fists, one pair of posed hands, one pair of relaxed hands, and one pair of Specium Beam shooting pose hands.
nodes.name: Ultraman Suit Zoffy (Anime Version)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Nemesis Now are excited to present the Iron Maiden Piece of Mind Bust Box!  One of Iron Maidan's most popular albums 'Piece of Mind' comes to life in this 9.84' tall bust box of the beast on the cover of the album.  Make sure to place your order today!
nodes.name: Iron Maiden Piece of Mind Bust Box

nodes.description: Alex Ross applies his amazing illustrative skills to The Six Million Dollar Man on this super-rare variant cover!  Better. Stronger. Faster. The original Six Million Dollar Man, Steve Austin, was a man barely alive until the OSI transformed him into the world's first Bionic Man. Now, he and Oscar Goldman are the most effective team in National Security. But a rogue faction in the OSI is making a power play for that position with a new type of infiltration agent - one that is completely obedient and robotic. Fan-favorite classic action figure Maskatron joins the official Six Million Dollar Man original television continuity. Can a soulless machine that wears Steve Austin's very face make the Six Million Dollar Man obsolete? And as Steve's world is threatened from within, his very actions unknowingly release an alien menace upon an unsuspecting world. it's a return to the original 1970s Six Million Dollar Man in all its groovy bionic glory!  Alex Ross is a fan favorite, award-winning, American comic book writer and artist known primarily for his painted interiors, covers, and design work. He first became known with the 1994 miniseries Marvels, on which he collaborated with writer Kurt Busiek for Marvel Comics. He has worked with Marvel, DC and Dynamite in his career spanning over three decades and still going strong! Ships bagged and boarded with a Dynamite Certificate of Authenticity!
nodes.name: The Six Million Dollar Man #6 Alex Ross Virgin Art Ultra Limited Variant

nodes.description: Sideshow and Kidrobot are proud to present the new premium Kyle vinyl art figure from South Park. Allowing you to carefully study one of the show's most iconic characters, take a peek inside Kyle. The South Park Kyle Anatomy Art Figure from Kidrobot stands 8 inches tall.
nodes.name: Kyle Anatomy

nodes.description: As a hunter, you'll take on quests to hunt monsters in a variety of habitats.   PureArts, in collaboration with Capcom, is thrilled to present the Pukei-Pukei Statue! Flying in from the forested lands of Monster Hunter World and sitting atop a beautifully detailed environment base, this statue measures over 17 inches tall and features dazzling iridescent colors and stunningly life-like elements from top to bottom.  Fans of Monster Hunter and the hit action role-playing game Monster Hunter World will love every inch of this colorful Bird Wyvern! Be sure to add to your collection today!
nodes.name: Pukei-Pukei

nodes.description: Sideshow and Kinetiquettes present the Attack on Titan - Hope for Humanity Diorama.  Kinetiquettes is thrilled to announce that it's first major anime/manga statue, Attack on Titan - 'Hope for Humanity' diorama, is now available for pre-orders.  This massive diorama actually consists of 3 figures, Eren Yeager - Attack Titan, Levi Ackerman, and Mikasa Ackerman.  Eren Yeager (エレン・イェーガー) was a former member of the Survey Corps. He was the main protagonist of Attack on Titan. He lived in Shiganshina District with his parents until the fall of Wall Maria, where he impotently witnessed his mother being eaten by a Titan. This event would lead to Eren's intense hatred towards the Titans as he swore to wipe all of them off the face of the Earth.  Levi Ackerman (リヴァイ・アッカーマン), often formally referred to as Captain Levi (リヴァイ兵長), is the squad captain of the Special Operations Squad within the Survey Corps and is widely known as humanity's strongest soldier.  Mikasa Ackerman (ミカサ・アッカーマン) is one of the two deuteragonists of the series, along with Armin Arlert. After her parents were murdered by human traffickers, Mikasa was rescued by Eren Yeager and lived with him and his parents, Grisha and Carla, before the fall of Wall Maria. She is the last descendant of the Shogun clan that stayed on Paradis Island, thereby related to the Azumabito family, and holds significant political power in Hizuru.
nodes.name: Attack on Titan - Hope for Humanity

nodes.description: Sideshow and First 4 Figures are proud to present the latest SD collectible, Lord's Blade Ciaran!  This is the sixth SD statue in the Dark Souls SD lineup and the first resin SD statue in all of First 4 Figures. Lord's Blade Ciaran is one of the Four Knights of Gwyn, Lord of Cinder and member of the Lord's Blades. The statue is inspired by the moment when players first meet Ciaran in the coliseum at the Oolacile Township with the base fashioned after the pillars and cracked ground found there.  Ciaran's armor—Lord's Blade Set has been beautifully replicated here with realistic details. Her Gold and Dark Silver Tracer are key details included in this statue as well! Her armor is common to all Lord's Blades but the porcelain mask is unique to her, representing a mark of honor.
nodes.name: Lord's Blade Ciaran SD

nodes.description: The Bruiser of The Bad Batch™ Smashes on New Silver Coin!  Made from 1oz pure silver, the coin showcases a colored image of Wrecker™ in his armor, ready to cause a ruckus. Detailed engravings of his helmet and the phrases 'The Bad Batch' and 'The Clone Force 99' are also included. A mirror finish for the background completes this splendid design. As a legal tender coin, the obverse bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II.   It is presented inside an impressive Star Wars™ branded case, which includes compelling images of the entire squad. A Certificate of Authenticity can be found at the back of the box, along with the coin's unique number in the mintage of 3,000.   You can be one of the few people to own this rare collectible, so don't delay. Order now!
nodes.name: Wrecker 1oz Silver Coin
Fresh Cut Grass: Smiley Day! Fine Art Print

nodes.description: Available for pre-order for a limited time only.  In a future world torn apart by hatred of all mutants, Wolverine is one of the few remaining X-Men able to continue the fight against Sentinels - the highly efficient mutant-killing machines. Now older and wiser, Wolverine volunteers to go back in time and rally the X-Men of the past to restore the world to its rightful path.  Sideshow and Hot Toys is thrilled to revisit the highly-acclaimed X-Men: Days of Future Past movie by presenting a Deluxe Version of Wolverine outfitted in 1973 fashion as the latest sixth scale collectible figure, comes with a remarkable diorama base to compliment the display.   The movie-accurate collectible figure is beautifully crafted based on the appearance of Hugh Jackman as Wolverine in the movie. It features a newly developed head sculpt and hair sculpture with impressive likeness, carefully tailored costume with a genuine leather jacket to complete his striking look, interchangeable hands with bone claws and a pair of seamless forearms and clawed hands for Wolverine's alternate styling.   The Deluxe Version includes a greatly detail diorama figure base that replicates the peculiar terrain of combat.  A Special Edition available in selected markets includes a Sentinel forearm machine gun.  This Wolverine figure will be a unique one among your collection!
nodes.name: Wolverine (1973 Version) (Deluxe Version) (Special Edition)

nodes.description: Available for pre-order for a limited time only.  The unstoppable X-Men from the original X-Men film trilogy, including Wolverine, join forces with the younger selves from the past in order to change a historic event and fight in an epic battle that could save the future. As a continuation of the X-Men collection, Sideshow and Hot Toys are very excited to officially introduce a 1973 Version of Wolverine as a sixth scale collectible figure inspired by the X-Men: Days of Future Past movie.  The highly-accurate collectible figure is specially crafted based on the appearance of Hugh Jackman as Wolverine in the movie. It features a newly developed head sculpt and hair sculpture with incredible likeness, skillfully tailored costume with a genuine leather jacket, interchangeable hands with bone claws, a pair of seamless forearms and clawed hands for Wolverine for alternate styling and figure stand for display.  A Special Edition available in selected markets includes a Sentinel forearm machine gun.   Don't miss your chance to add this Wolverine figure to your collection!
nodes.name: Wolverine (1973 Version) (Special Edition)

nodes.description: She's aliiiiive!  Sideshow Art Prints and Ozone Productions present the Frankie Reborn Fine Art Print, an electrifying new pinup art print by the renowned Olivia De Berardinis.  In this reimagined variant of Olivia's original piece titled Franky's Bride, mad science and sultry style combine in the laboratory to give a bizarre beauty new life! Model Tiah Eckhardt serves as the face of the iconic monstress as she removes her pink bandages to reveal the beauty of her creation. From the height of her hair to the stiletto heels, Frankie is drop dead gorgeous, boasting a tattoo of the mechanical woman Maria from Metropolis on her calf. The Body Snatcher chair beneath her is based on the captivating designs of artist Martin Meunier, making this beguiling bride truly the sum of her parts!  Each Frankie Reborn Fine Art Print is hand-signed by Olivia herself and features her official embossed Seal of Authenticity along with a hand-signed Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. This high-fidelity reproduction of Olivia's original acrylic on wood painting is available to fans as an unframed giclée with deckled hand-torn edges or in a custom framed presentation. Whether you're a pinup enthusiast or a horror art collector, you won't want to miss adding this Frankenstein creation to your collection!  Unwrap something alluring and bring home the Frankie Reborn Fine Art Print by Olivia De Berardinis today.
nodes.name: Frankie Reborn

nodes.description: Nice birdie…   Sideshow and Ozone Productions present the Little Bird Fine Art Print, a captivating DC Comics art print by renowned pinup artist Olivia De Berardinis.  Cat got your tongue? The Little Bird Fine Art Print depicts a leather-clad Catwoman swallowing down a flashy finch. Selina Kyle's sinister claws frame her pale face while the brightly colored bird flees from the passionate predator's scarlet-stained lips. Catwoman's black bust is accented by bold gold brush strokes that, alongside an expert use of negative white space, add a little glamor to this Gotham City villain's dark deed.  Inspired by Tim Burton's Batman Returns (1992), this DC Comics collectible is now being offered for the first time in fine art form, presented as an unframed giclée with hand-torn edges or in a custom framed format. Each Little Bird Fine Art Print is hand-signed by Olivia herself and includes her official embossed Seal of Authenticity as well as a signed Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces.  Don't be afraid of a little fowl play. Add the Little Bird Fine Art Print to your Batman art collection today!
nodes.name: Little Bird

nodes.description: 'Did you hear that?'  Sideshow and Vice Press present An American Werewolf In London Variant Fine Art Lithograph by Matt Ferguson!  This 24 x 36 limited edition lithograph print is unframed and hand-numbered on 300gsm archival paper with an authenticity hologram on the reverse. Printed in the UK by White Duck Editions.  A must-have for horror fans!
nodes.name: An American Werewolf In London Variant

nodes.description: Sideshow and Ozone Productions present the Bettie Page: Carpe Noctem Fine Art Print, a horror fantasy pinup art print by the renowned artist Olivia De Berardinis.  She's the pinup girl of your darkest dreams! Bettie Page is one of Olivia's most frequently painted subjects, embodying femininity and fantasy across the prolific artist's portfolio. This macabre and moody portrait transforms the iconic model into a vampiric vixen shrouded by a cloudy nighttime sky. Page's hypnotic gaze and alluring physique mesmerize onlookers as a pair of bats take wing beside her. Once she has you captivated, the fangs are sure to follow.  Officially licensed and created for Olivia's 2023 art calendar, this spine-chilling scene is available for the first time as a high-end collectible print. Presented as an unframed giclée with deckled hand-torn edges or in a custom framed format, this pinup wall art recreates the original acrylic on wood painting in high-fidelity detail. Each Bettie Page: Carpe Noctem Fine Art Print is hand-signed by Olivia herself and includes her official embossed Seal of Authenticity and a signed Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces.  Seize the night and let the darkness take hold when you bring home the Bettie Page: Carpe Noctem Fine Art Print by Olivia De Berardinis for your collection.
nodes.name: Bettie Page: Carpe Noctem

nodes.description: I'm breaking the laws of nature. I know.   Sideshow presents the Doctor Strange Fine Art Print, a spellbinding Marvel art print by artist Greg Ruth.  The Doctor Strange Fine Art Print shows Stephen Strange clad in his scarlet Cloak of Levitation and framed by the Sanctum Sanctorum's circular window. This skilled Sorcerer Supreme wields the Time Stone, which emits waves of glowing green energy from within the Eye of Agamotto hanging around his neck. Below Doctor Strange, the villain Dormammu's realm expands in an infinite violet universe of debris and darkness.  Inspired by Scott Derrickson's Doctor Strange (2016), this original Marvel collectible is a must-have for fans of the MCU. Each Doctor Strange Fine Art Print features an embossed Sideshow logo and is hand-numbered as part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. Available as an unframed, full bleed fine art giclée print or in a custom framed presentation, this Marvel wall art makes a magical addition to any collection.  Master the mystic arts when you bring home the Doctor Strange Fine Art Print by Greg Ruth today!
nodes.name: Doctor Strange

nodes.description: 'Beware the moon...'  Sideshow and Vice Press present An American Werewolf In London Fine Art Lithograph by Matt Ferguson!  This 24 x 36 limited edition lithograph print is unframed and hand-numbered on 300gsm archival paper with an authenticity hologram on the reverse. Printed in the UK by White Duck Editions.  A must-have for horror fans!
nodes.name: An American Werewolf In London

nodes.description: Sideshow and the FuRyu Corporation present the Anya Forger Figure.  From the hit anime Spy x Family comes a new F:Nex figure of Anya Forger in her Eden school uniform!  Anya poses brilliantly on the cobblestone base with her stuffed chimera and a toy gun in her hand! The uniform is a luxurious design with gold decorations on black.  Anya has been carefully recreated down to the last detail, from her hair ornaments to her socks and shoes.
nodes.name: Anya Forger

nodes.description: Sideshow and the FuRyu Corporation present the Loid Forger Figure.  From the hit anime series Spy x Family comes a new F:Nex figure of Loid Forger also known as code name: Twilight!  Loid walks briskly across the cobblestone base in a three-piece deep green suit, with a silenced pistol in hand. The three-piece suit is beautifully graded with a deep shade of green, and his red tie contrasts and shines through.  Loid has been carefully recreated down to the last detail, from suit pockets and button handles to the badges at the collar.
nodes.name: Loid Forger

nodes.description: 'I was murdered, an unnatural death, and now I walk the earth in limbo until the werewolf's curse is lifted.'  Sideshow and Vice Press present An American Werewolf In London Editions Variant Fine Art Print by Matt Ferguson!  This 16.5 x 23.4 limited edition fine art pigment print is unframed and hand-numbered on Mohawk 270gsm Ultrawhite paper with archival inks and an authenticity hologram on the reverse. Printed in the UK by White Duck Editions.  A must-have for horror fans!
nodes.name: An American Werewolf In London Editions Variant

nodes.description: I'm Master Skywalker's Padawan. The name's Ahsoka Tano.   Sideshow presents the Ahsoka Tano™ Sixth Scale Figure, a new Star Wars™ collectible figure inspired by the character's iconic animated appearance in Star Wars: The Clone Wars™.  The Ahsoka Tano Sixth Scale Figure captures the Padawan™ learner's distinct design from the fan-favorite animated series The Clone Wars, as she follows the path of the Jedi™ under the tutelage of Anakin Skywalker™. This articulated figure features a stylized headsculpt with her signature blue and white striped montrals™ and lekku™. Her carefully tailored fabric costume consists of a maroon bodysuit, dark gray leggings, and a belt with hooks for her lightsaber hilts. Ahsoka Tano additionally has seamless joints in her unique orange complexion, and sculpted arm guards and boots complete her look.  The Ahsoka Tano Sixth Scale Figure includes a variety of stylized hands and swap-out accessories to give collectors a wide range of display options for the Togruta™ Force-wielder. Ahsoka Tano comes with four pairs of hands including a pair of fists, a pair of grip hands, a pair of neutral open hands, and a pair of gesture hands for numerous pose configurations. In addition, she comes with her signature dual lightsabers, two bladeless hilts, and a holoprojector accessory with a sculpted Captain Rex™ hologram for communicating with the loyal clone trooper™.  Pair Ahsoka Tano with the Anakin Skywalker Sixth Scale Figure and Obi-Wan Kenobi™ Sixth Scale Figure by Sideshow, each sold separately, to reunite these noble peacekeepers in your Star Wars collection.  Snips is ready and waiting for her next mission — so bring home the Ahsoka Tano Sixth Scale Figure today!
nodes.name: Ahsoka Tano

nodes.description: Following the launch of the popular DLX Iron Man Mark 50 figure, Sideshow, Threezero, and Marvel Studios are proud to present a set of carefully-crafted accessory weapons to maximize the power of the Iron Man Mark 50 nanotechnology suit!  The DLX Iron Man Mark 50 Accessory Pack accurately replicates the original design from Marvel Studios' Avengers: Infinity War.   The Mark 50 Accessory Pack features several highly-detailed interchangeable accessories to upgrade your DLX Iron Man Mark 50 figure (sold separately), including a Hand Blade, Repulsor Cannon, Power Mallet, Shield, Round Shield, a Nano Booster, one pair of Battering Rams, one pair of Zero Cannons, two pairs of Energy Displacer Sentries, and a set of action stands for Energy Displacer Sentries. LED lighting functions are located on the Repulsor Cannon, Power Mallet, Battering Rams, Zero Cannons, and Energy Displacer Sentries.  Don't miss your chance to order this Accessory Pack and upgrade your DLX Iron Man Mark 50 Collectible Figure today!
nodes.name: DLX Iron Man Mark 50 Accessory Pack

nodes.description: The J. Scott Campbell 'Crimson Blood' Edition, available only on Vampirella #3, allows you a view of the artist's dynamic linework in Vampirella-appropriate Bloody Red!  Seduction of The Innocent Book Three of Twelve: Vampirella's struggle to deal with the complex emotional consequences of a major disaster caused by her enemies is exacerbated by an unexpected visit from her mother, Lilith, with whom Vampi has a complicated relationship. But has the Mother of All Vampires come to help or destroy her daughter? And will Vampirella's hapless therapist survive the encounter?  Jeffery Scott Campbell is an American comic book artist. He was initially known professionally as Jeffery Scott, but is best known as J. Scott Campbell. He rose to fame as an artist for Wildstorm Comics, though he has since done work for Marvel Comics, and the video game industry.  If you're a fan of Vampi, Mr. Campbell, or both, you'll surely want this limited cover as part of your collection! Ships bagged and boarded with a Dynamite Certificate of Authenticity, only 25 pieces ever produced!
nodes.name: Vampirella #3 J. Scott Campbell Virgin "Crimson Blood" Red Variant

nodes.description: The first release in the new S.H.Figuarts ELDEN RING series! Festering Fingerprint Vyke is fully articulated, with flexible materials used for dynamic and unhindered posing. The set also includes both Vyke's War Spear and the Flame of frenzy effect parts, letting you re-create dramatic scenes. Standing 6.3' high, this knight of the Roundtable this invader will cast an imposing presence in your collection. Arise now, ye tarnished.
nodes.name: Festering Fingerprint Vyke
